description: Registry state with status 'in progress' (contains a space). The pattern `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$` permits only lowercase ASCII letters, digits, and underscore. RFC-ACDP-0004 §4.1 mandates rejection.

expected.rationale: Whitespace is not in the status alphabet. Future spec values use snake_case (e.g. 'in_progress' would be valid; 'in progress' is not). Rejection forces registries to use the wire-canonical underscore form.
